001package guiDiscussion;
002
003/**
004 * Controller for the discussion board GUI.
005 *
006 * <p>This controller coordinates user actions from the view with discussion data operations in
007 * the model. It applies role checks for restricted actions and refreshes view output after
008 * successful create, read, update, and delete operations.
009 *
010 * <p>Students User Story alignment includes creating posts, reading all posts, searching by
011 * keyword, updating posts, creating replies, and viewing replies for a selected post.
012 *
013 * @author TP2 Team
014 * @version 1.00 2026-03-18 MVC documentation update
015 */
016public class ControllerDiscussionBoard {
017
018        private static final ModelDiscussionBoard model = new ModelDiscussionBoard();
019
020        /**
021         * Default constructor is not used. Controller methods are invoked statically by the view.
022         */
023        public ControllerDiscussionBoard() {
024        }
025
026        /**
027         * Reads and displays all posts and their replies in the output area.
028         */
029        protected static void showAllPosts() {
030                ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostOutput.setText(model.readAllPostsText());
031        }
032
033        /**
034         * Creates a post from user input fields and refreshes the display on success.
035         */
036        protected static void createPost() {
037                String title = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostTitle.getText();
038                String body = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostBody.getText();
039                String author = getAuthorRoleLabel();
040
041                String error = model.createPost(title, body, author);
042                if (error != null) {
043                        ViewDiscussionBoard.showError(error);
044                        return;
045                }
046
047                ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostTitle.clear();
048                ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostBody.clear();
049                showAllPosts();
050        }
051
052        /**
053         * Deletes a post by title when the current user has admin or staff privileges.
054         */
055        protected static void deletePost() {
056                if (!canDeletePost()) {
057                        ViewDiscussionBoard.showError("Only Admin or Staff can delete posts.");
058                        return;
059                }
060
061                String title = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostTitle.getText();
062                String error = model.deletePostByTitle(title);
063                if (error != null) {
064                        ViewDiscussionBoard.showError(error);
065                        return;
066                }
067                showAllPosts();
068        }
069
070        /**
071         * Updates an existing post title/body using input fields and refreshes output on success.
072         */
073        protected static void updatePost() {
074                String title = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostTitle.getText();
075                String newTitle = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_UpdateTitle.getText();
076                String newBody = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostBody.getText();
077
078                String error = model.updatePostByTitle(title, newTitle, newBody);
079                if (error != null) {
080                        ViewDiscussionBoard.showError(error);
081                        return;
082                }
083
084                ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostTitle.clear();
085                ViewDiscussionBoard.text_UpdateTitle.clear();
086                ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostBody.clear();
087                showAllPosts();
088        }
089
090        /**
091         * Runs a keyword search over posts and displays the matching subset.
092         */
093        protected static void searchPostsByKeyword() {
094                String keyword = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_SearchKeyword.getText();
095                ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostOutput.setText(model.searchPostsByKeywordText(keyword));
096        }
097
098        /**
099         * Creates a reply for the selected post title and refreshes posts on success.
100         */
101        protected static void createReply() {
102                String title = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_ReplyPostTitle.getText();
103                String body = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_ReplyBody.getText();
104                String author = getAuthorRoleLabel();
105
106                String error = model.createReplyByPostTitle(title, body, author);
107                if (error != null) {
108                        ViewDiscussionBoard.showError(error);
109                        return;
110                }
111
112                ViewDiscussionBoard.text_ReplyBody.clear();
113                showAllPosts();
114        }
115
116        /**
117         * Displays all replies associated with the title entered in the reply target field.
118         */
119        protected static void listRepliesForPost() {
120                String title = ViewDiscussionBoard.text_ReplyPostTitle.getText();
121                ViewDiscussionBoard.text_PostOutput.setText(model.listRepliesForPostTitle(title));
122        }
123
124        /**
125         * Returns the user to the role-specific home page.
126         */
127        protected static void performReturn() {
128                if (ViewDiscussionBoard.returnRole == 1) {
129                        guiAdminHome.ViewAdminHome.displayAdminHome(ViewDiscussionBoard.theStage, ViewDiscussionBoard.theUser);
130                } else if (ViewDiscussionBoard.returnRole == 2) {
131                        guiStudentHome.ViewStudentHome.displayStudentHome(ViewDiscussionBoard.theStage, ViewDiscussionBoard.theUser);
132                } else {
133                        guiStaffHome.ViewStaffHome.displayStaffHome(ViewDiscussionBoard.theStage, ViewDiscussionBoard.theUser);
134                }
135        }
136
137        /**
138         * Determines whether the current user can delete posts.
139         *
140         * @return true when delete is permitted; false otherwise
141         */
142        private static boolean canDeletePost() {
143                return model.canDeletePosts(ViewDiscussionBoard.theUser);
144        }
145
146        /**
147         * Returns the current user's username for author fields.
148         *
149         * @return current user's username
150         */
151        private static String getAuthorRoleLabel() {
152                return ViewDiscussionBoard.theUser.getUserName();
153        }
154}
